name: Discount Jewelry & Pawn
description_short: Discount Jewelry & Pawn is a pawn shop in West Park, Florida offering collateral-based loans and jewelry/precious metals buying services.
description_long:
Discount Jewelry & Pawn operates as a traditional pawn shop located at 4040 SW 40th Ave in West Park, Florida 33023. The business serves the local South Florida community with services typical of the pawn industry. According to FindAPawnShop.com, the shop maintains consistent operating hours Monday through Wednesday from 10AM-7PM, with a 4.9-star rating based on 29 customer reviews on Google, suggesting strong customer satisfaction within their service area. The high rating indicates reliable service delivery and fair dealing with customers seeking pawn transactions.

As a pawn shop, Discount Jewelry & Pawn likely offers collateral-based lending where customers can borrow money by pledging personal items of value as security. The business name emphasizes jewelry and precious metals, suggesting these are primary inventory categories they accept and evaluate. Pawn shops typically evaluate items, provide loans based on assessed value with established repayment terms, and hold collateral until the loan is repaid. This business model serves customers who need quick access to cash and have valuable personal items they're willing to use as loan collateral.

The 4.9-star rating across 29 reviews is a significant distinguishing factor, placing this shop in the higher-satisfaction range for pawn shop operations. The consistent operating hours and established phone line (+1 954-893-8700) suggest a professional, stable operation rather than a temporary or informal service. Located in West Park, a densely populated area of Broward County, the shop benefits from reasonable foot traffic and accessibility for local residents seeking pawn services.

However, the available website information is limited to basic business data—location, hours, phone, and rating. No specific details are provided about interest rates, loan terms, fees, specific items accepted beyond "jewelry," buyback policies, or redemption procedures. Consumers should contact the business directly to understand their lending terms and whether their collateral matches the shop's acquisition focus. Like all pawn transactions, borrowers risk losing collateral if loans aren't repaid according to terms.
pros: High 4.9-star Google rating based on 29 customer reviews
Established phone contact line for pre-transaction inquiries
Located in accessible West Park area with good local foot traffic
Specializes in jewelry and precious metals—transparent focus area
Professional listing on FindAPawnShop.com indicates formal registration
cons: Limited website information—no details on interest rates or loan terms provided
No published fee schedule or redemption procedures available online
Incomplete posted hours (only Monday-Wednesday shown; Friday-Sunday hours unknown)
No online application or quote system for collateral evaluation
Risk of losing collateral if loan terms not met—typical pawn shop limitation
best_for: Consumers needing quick cash and willing to pledge jewelry or precious metals
Individuals seeking non-credit-based lending without credit checks
People looking to sell or pawn gold, jewelry, and other valuable items locally
diagnosis: Discount Jewelry & Pawn is best for West Park-area residents needing fast cash without credit qualification who have jewelry or precious metals to pledge. The main caveat is that collateral is at risk if loans aren't repaid, and actual loan terms (rates, fees, duration) require direct contact to confirm.
